ItacPersonItem.Notes: Jurist. Joined the Ricovrati in 1601. He was also a lawyer, archeologist, coin collector. Rector of the `Universita` della lana di Padova`. His portrait is taken from Tomasini, Illustrium virorum elogia (1630)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
